title: AsyncOPD: How Stale Can On-Policy Distillation Be?
innovation_summary: AsyncOPD: How Stale Can On-Policy Distillation Be: We present the first systematic study of staleness in asynchronous OPD, focusing on a practical setting where teacher feedback is implemented through local KL losses and.
